title: GAIA hook tree-scope manifest
description: Constrains .gaia/hook-scopes.json: the one declaration of every .claude/hooks/**/*.sh script's tree scope (INV-5). A malformed edit fails this cheap validation before check-hook-scope-manifest.bats runs its conformance assertions (coverage, the derive arm, and any-honesty).

hook.description: Repo-relative path to the hook script. Unique across the manifest.

scope.description: main-only: anchors on the main checkout root (gaia_resolve_main_root); covers registry scope main-only AND shared (shared state physically lives under main's .gaia/local, SPEC-061). per-tree: anchors on the current tree root (gaia_resolve_tree_root, payload-cwd-anchored); covers registry scope per-tree. any: touches no root-anchored .gaia/local state, exempt from the derive arm.

state.description: State-registry entry ids (.gaia/state-registry.json) the hook touches, or a path:<repo-relative-path> token for a tracked per-checkout working file with no registry entry (e.g. wiki/hot.md, a .claude/* session marker). Empty for scope: any.

why.description: Plain-language reason this hook carries this scope: what it does, why that scope is correct, or (for a not-yet-converted hook) which phase owns its conversion.
